title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXXVIII. Paradoxes.
content:
Barney Bodkin broke his nose,
        Without feet we can't have toes;
        Crazy folks are always mad,
        Want of money makes us sad.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXXVIII. Paradoxes."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
